hero.title: Future Vision
hero.description: Backend developer building modern systems with clarity, speed, and elegance.

about.heading: About
paragraphs: I am Isabelle, a backend developer with a focus on clean architecture and reliable systems.
I enjoy turning complex problems into polished applications using modern backend techniques.
This page highlights my skills, experience, and the thoughtful approach I bring to every project.

members.name: Isabelle
members.role: Backend developer specialising in Java, C#, Go, and collaborative engineering.

intro.heading: About me... 👾
paragraphs: Hey there! My name is Isabelle, an eighteen year old backend developer that handles the backbone of a website or an app.
Since middle school, I was fascinated with coding and had developed a few websites just by self-learning.
I may not be the greatest in the room, but there is always something in me that would catch your attention.
This page will further demonstrate my abilities and if you're interested to collab, you know where to find me.
intro.languages: English (native), Chinese (native), Malay (fluent), German (still in progress)
intro.education: International General Cambridge Secondary Education & Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering (pursuing)

skills.heading: SKILLS
items: Strong cooperative skills with the ability to work effectively with teams.
Always willing to learn and never stops being curious.
Coding language acquired: HTML, GO, CSS, JavaScript, Python, SQL.
Able to analyse and solve problems swiftly using critical-thinking skills.
Capable of introducing innovative, modern, and refreshing ideas.

experience.heading: EXPERIENCE
items: 1. Varsity Hackathon (V HACK 2025) - Successfully secured 1st runner-up in the competition.

2. Advanced Web Application Development - Designed an effective application interface in visual environment, implementing variables, data structures, database management, modern web APIs, and web connections.
3. Web Design - Collaborated with designers to implement new user interface features, enhancing user experience across multiple platforms using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

contact.heading: CONTACT
contact.description: Here comes to the end of my CV. If ever you are curious my projects or interested in working with me, feel free to hit the buttons below to find out my GitHub, LinkedIn, and email account to explore more.
